title: Phase 5 Consolidated Assurance and Governance Library
authority: Approved product/technical sources, qualified subject-matter authority and evidence-based release governance

families.title: QA and Release Assurance
families.description: One traceable register for flow acceptance, contracts, providers, security, recovery, UAT, release gates and Go/No-Go evidence.

families.title: Legal and Compliance
families.description: One internal clause library and compliance map for Terms, Privacy, Tasker, cancellation/refund, safety, KYC, location and payment/wallet policy. It is not legal approval or public publication.

families.title: Decisions and Governance
families.description: One governed register for accepted decisions, design conflicts, risks, open questions and cross-document propagation.

editRule: Edit the three JSON family sources after bootstrap; do not rerun this migration script for normal changes.
